title: Loki’s Shadow Over the Island
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Road as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now I see!!! If you believe those blue- prints...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Show every- thing about this realm, then you are mistaken..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Verily, this place is, in truth, a giant detention center!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why's he talking like a samural?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This facility was designed to ensure no giant escapes its walls!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you were to reach the other side...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think you have a hope of breaking through?! That way is another dead end!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This resistance is futile. Ahead is the domain of the mighty ear god!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: about the ear god, the truth is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We found his body burned to a crisp earlier today. The cause is unknown!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We thought our misfortune couldn't get any worse...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Then we saw the cracks in the sky!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
